title: Peter Rabbit Enamel Mug
features: BELOVED CHARACTER: This enamel mug features the beloved Peter Rabbit. The mug features new artwork highlighting famous London buildings and an iconic London bus.
ICONIC DESIGN: The printed mug features the iconic Beatrix Potter artwork of Peter Rabbit alongside modern London landmarks. It makes the perfect gift for fans of Beatrix Potter characters.

STURDY ENAMEL: The mug is crafted from long-lasting enamel material and is a perfect choice for children to use. The lightweight material makes it suitable for small hands to carry and use. The sturdy enamel mug holds 320ml of liquid.
IDEAL TRAVEL MUG: The sturdy design makes this mug perfect for camping or using in the garden. The charming modern Peter Rabbit design makes it an ideal choice for picnics and parties.
PERFECT GIFT: The beautiful artwork makes this a perfect gift for fans of Beatrix Potter and the iconic Peter Rabbit.
description: From the manufacturer Peter Rabbit London Enamel Mug Sturdy Enamel Design The mug is crafted from long-lasting enamel material and is a perfect choice for children to use. The lightweight material makes it suitable for small hands to carry and use. This charming enamel mug holds 320ml of liquid. Great For Travel, Picnics and Camping Perfect Travel Mug The sturdy design makes this mug perfect for camping or using in the garden. The charming modern Peter Rabbit design makes it an ideal choice for picnics and parties. This gorgeous mug is also dishwasher safe. Gorgeous London Landmark Artwork Makes An Ideal Gift The beautiful artwork makes this a perfect gift for fans of the iconic Beatrix Potter. This enamel mug features the beloved Peter Rabbit out and about in London. The mug features new artwork highlighting famous London buildings and an iconic London bus. About Robert Frederick At Robert Frederick we create exciting products that inspire, entertain and will bring a smile to your face. We proudly design our gifts in Bath, UK. If you’re shopping for that special gift, we have something for everyone. We absolutely love what we do, and we hope you do too.
